title: ASSIMILATED Dweller
description: Unofficial 1.20.1 Forge port of Smoreh's Assimilated Dweller. A terrifying parasite-possessed cave creature that stalks, chases and hunts you down. Original mod by Smoreh вҖ” ported by Tick Hosting.
body:
**Smoreh's ASSIMILATED Dweller вҖ” Unofficial 1.20.1 Port**

> вҡ пёҸ **This is an unofficial port.** All credit for the original mod goes to **[Smoreh](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-assimilated-dweller-v2)**. This port was created by **Tick Hosting** solely to make the mod available on Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge. Please support the original author!

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Welcome to **Smoreh's Assimilated Dweller**! This mod introduces a terrifying new variant of the classic Cave Dweller.

Once a harmless creature, the Dweller has now been _assimilated_ and it's going to hunt YOU down.

### Hunt. Overwhelm. Assimilate.

The Assimilated Dweller stalks. Its mind is no longer its own only the parasite remains.

If you hear its distorted laughter echoing through the cavesвҖҰ **It's already too late.**

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

### рҹ“Ұ Requirements

*   Minecraft **1.20.1** (Forge)
*   **[GeckoLib 4](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib)** for 1.20.1

### рҹ”— Original Mod

вһЎпёҸ [The Assimilated Dweller v2 by Smoreh](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-assimilated-dweller-v2) вҖ” support the original creator!

### вҡҷпёҸ Port

Ported to 1.20.1 by **Tick Hosting**. No changes to gameplay, models, sounds or textures вҖ” this is a straight technical port.

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
